form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 3rd of 16 at Tokyo on June 22 over 1600m, 4 len behind Sanono Greater carrying 55.0kg at $2.60. Went for a break before returning tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.5 len at Tokyo February 14 over 1800m defeating Shinyanga with 55.0kg at $3.80. On speed and too strong fresh. Sure to go well again.
